commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds CE-011/provider-denial matching, classifies embedded Pi isError payloads through the shared failover classifier, and adds focused regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main returns null for the reported non-GPT CE-011 isError payload, while the PR head classifies that payload; the review finding is also source-reproducible with a hook_block isError payload whose replacement text matches an auth pattern.
commands.review_followup: The blocker is a narrow, automerge-repairable ordering bug in the embedded result classifier with a clear regression test target.

target.title: fix(agents): classify embedded provider business denials for fallback
target.body:

The edit pass should inspect the live PR diff, review comments, and failing checks; rebase if needed; keep the contributor branch credited; and stop only when validation is green or an external blocker is proven.
